name: Resource Usage Indicator
desc: Mobile-first design pattern prioritizes mobile experience, progressively enhancing for larger screens.

comps.d: Component implementing Resource Usage Indicator functionality
Component implementing Resource Usage Indicator functionality
Component implementing Resource Usage Indicator functionality
Component implementing Resource Usage Indicator functionality

ops.def: $mobile(content: Content) → MobileLayout = layout := MobileLayout(); layout.viewport := "width=device-width"; layout.content := linearize(content); layout.touch := enable\_touch\_targets(); return layout$

ops.sig: breakpoint(layout: Layout, min_width: ℝ, enhancements: Enhancements) → Layout
ops.def: $breakpoint(layout: Layout, min\_width: ℝ, enhancements: Enhancements) → Layout = media\_query := "@media (min-width: " + min\_width + ")"; layout.breakpoints[media\_query] := enhancements; return layout$

ops.sig: progressive(mobile: MobileLayout, tablet: TabletEnhancements, desktop: DesktopEnhancements) → ResponsiveLayout
ops.def: $progressive(mobile: MobileLayout, tablet: TabletEnhancements, desktop: DesktopEnhancements) → ResponsiveLayout = layout := ResponsiveLayout(mobile); add\_breakpoint(layout, 768, tablet); add\_breakpoint(layout, 1024, desktop); return layout$

manif.d: Applied in ai, resources systems and architectures
